_readme: Edit these values then run: python3 install.py  — or use the dashboard Settings panel (⚙ top-right)
_sync_note: sync_path can be any folder both machines access: Obsidian vault, Dropbox, OneDrive, network share, or leave blank to disable
_auto_cat_note: auto_categorize: false stops all name-matching — everything logs as uncategorized until re-enabled
